samples.xml_description:
Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Output enable. Product. 8 mul_en_out_reg mul_a_reg mul_b_reg temp[N] sum[N] mul_out_reg

Reset the registers.

rst_n==0 begin mul_en_out_reg <= 0; mul_a_reg <= 0; mul_b_reg <= 0; mul_out_reg <= 0; end rst_n==1 begin mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[N-2:0], mul_en_in}; mul_a_reg <= mul_a; mul_b_reg <= mul_b; end

Generate the partial products based on the multiplier bits.

temp[0] = {{N{mul_a_reg[0]}} & {mul_b_reg[0], {N{1'b0}}}} temp[1] = {{N{mul_a_reg[1]}} & {mul_b_reg[1], {N{1'b0}}}, 1'b0} temp[2] = {{N{mul_a_reg[2]}} & {mul_b_reg[2], {N{1'b0}}}, 2'b0} temp[3] = {{N{mul_a_reg[3]}} & {mul_b_reg[3], {N{1'b0}}}, 3'b0} temp[4] = {{N{mul_a_reg[4]}} & {mul_b_reg[4], {N{1'b0}}}, 4'b0} temp[5] = {{N{mul_a_reg[5]}} & {mul_b_reg[5], {N{1'b0}}}, 5'b0} temp[6] = {{N{mul_a_reg[6]}} & {mul_b_reg[6], {N{1'b0}}}, 6'b0} temp[7] = {{N{mul_a_reg[7]}} & {mul_b_reg[7], {N{1'b0}}}, 7'b0}

Calculate the partial sums.

rst_n==0 begin sum[0] <= 0; end rst_n==1 begin sum[0] <= temp[0]; sum[1] <= temp[1] + {{N{1'b0}}, mul_out_reg[N-2:0]}; sum[2] <= temp[2] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[1][N-2:0]}; sum[3] <= temp[3] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[2][N-2:0]}; sum[4] <= temp[4] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[3][N-2:0]}; sum[5] <= temp[5] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[4][N-2:0]}; sum[6] <= temp[6] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[5][N-2:0]}; sum[7] <= temp[7] + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[6][N-2:0]}; end

Calculate the final product.

rst_n==0 begin mul_out_reg <= 0; end rst_n==1 begin mul_out_reg <= mul_out_reg + {{N{1'b0}}, sum[7][N-2:0]}; end

Assign the output.

mul_en_out = mul_en_out_reg[N-1] mul_out = mul_en_out ? mul_out_reg : 0

TopModule.sv:9:      : It was declared here as a net.
